# System B Quality Report: metformin_ampk_cancer

## Quality Class

CASE_READY_FOR_ARCHIVE

## Comparison Readiness

READY_AS_POSITIVE_CONTROL

## Bundle Validation

- Schema valid: true
- Bundle consistent: true
- Ready for System B: true

## Limitations

- This is a positive-control white-box case, not a true conflict-discovery case.
- LINCS L1000 provides transcriptomic consistency evidence, not direct biochemical mechanism validation.
- External validation is mixed, not supportive.
- ChEMBL, Reactome, Enrichr, PubMed post-cutoff, and OpenTargets were recommended but unavailable.
- Full-text confirmation was disabled by case policy because this case has no true graph conflict.
